Hybrid assets that fuse physical graffiti art with digital NFT ownership, rooted in the storied tradition of Graffiti Kings.

Represent a unique intersection of tangible and digital art, carrying street-art defiance into the Crypto Moonboys universe.

Phygital prints are hybrid treasures in Block Topia, fusing physical graffiti art with digital NFT ownership to create assets that embody the Graffiti Kings’ legacy, allowing holders to stake them for $GK tokens or leverage their cultural weight in metaverse skirmishes.

Revered as symbols of rebellion, phygital prints often become centerpieces in virtual galleries or factional strongholds within the Crypto Moonboys universe, their dual nature as tangible and digital relics inspiring warriors of The GKniftyHEADS to fight for art’s enduring power.

Each phygital print is a bridge between worlds, carrying the raw energy of street art into Block Topia’s digital wars, where their blockchain-backed might can turn the tide of battle or serve as economic lifelines, echoing the real-world struggles of graffiti artists in every pixel.
